languages.text: {n}Вас цепляет фраза про "несговорчивость коллег". Кажется за его отбытием скрывается не только жажда знаний.{/n}
{n}It is the phrase "intransigence of colleagues" that strikes you. It seems that there was more to his departure than simply a thirst for knowledge.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вас цепляет фраза про "несговорчивость коллег". Кажется за его отбытием скрывается не только жажда знаний.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las palabras «intransigencia de colegas» te sorprenden. Parece que la búsqueda del conocimiento no fue lo único que motivó su partida.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las palabras «intransigencia de colegas» te sorprenden. Parece que la búsqueda del conocimiento no fue lo único que motivó su partida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}“同僚的顽固不化”这个措辞引起了你的注意。看来他离开的原因，不只是求知欲那么简单。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is the phrase "intransigence of colleagues" that strikes you. It seems that there was more to his departure than simply a thirst for knowledge.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}“同僚的顽固不化”这个措辞引起了你的注意。看来他离开的原因，不只是求知欲那么简单。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vous vous arrêtez sur les mots « intransigeance de mes collègues ». Son départ semble avoir été motivé par un peu plus qu'une simple soif de connaissances.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is the phrase "intransigence of colleagues" that strikes you. It seems that there was more to his departure than simply a thirst for knowledge.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous vous arrêtez sur les mots « intransigeance de mes collègues ». Son départ semble avoir été motivé par un peu plus qu'une simple soif de connaissances.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Formulierung 'Uneinsichtigkeit einiger Kollegen' lässt dich aufhorchen. Offenbar ging es in dieser Abteilung um etwas mehr als reinen Wissensdurst.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is the phrase "intransigence of colleagues" that strikes you. It seems that there was more to his departure than simply a thirst for knowledge.{/n}

languages.text: {n}印象的なのは "同僚の横暴 "という言葉だ。彼の去就には、単なる知識欲以上のものがあったようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}It is the phrase "intransigence of colleagues" that strikes you. It seems that there was more to his departure than simply a thirst for knowledge.{/n}

languages.text: {n}"Meslektaşların uzlaşmazlığı" ifadesine takılıyorsun. Görünüşe göre ayrılışının ardında irfan açlığından fazlası yatıyormuş.{/n}
